title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Lemon Tree Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Lemon Tree Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Lemon Tree Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lemon Tree Hotels:
Lemon Tree Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lemon Tree Hotels!
